title: Health Economics & Outcomes Research
description: The Health Economics and Outcomes Research (HEOR) module provides specialized analytical tools for evaluating the economic burden of disease, comparative value of treatments, and patient-reported outcomes. It supports payer, provider, and policy audiences with evidence generation for healthcare decision-making.
tips: Define outcome measures and cost components clearly before configuring HEOR analyses to ensure results are interpretable by decision-making audiences.
Use well-characterized cohorts as the foundation for HEOR models to minimize confounding in economic evaluations.
Document all assumptions underlying cost and utility inputs to support transparency and sensitivity analysis.
Align HEOR study designs with relevant payer or regulatory submission guidelines when generating evidence for coverage decisions.
